title: fagara pinnata
intro: Fagara pinnata, also known as Zanthoxylum piperitum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in East Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is rich in compounds that provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Fagara pinnata is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or infused in oil to make ointments for topical application.
